de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.ProofTreeEvent

Packages that use ProofTreeEvent
Package
Description
de.uka.ilkd.key.gui.plugins.caching
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.proof
This package contains the core data structures of proofs, nodes, goals, as well as machinery to deal with these data structures.
org.key_project.slicing
 
org.key_project.slicing.ui

    Method
    Description

    If the notes of a NodeInfo of a proof tree Node have changed.
    default void

    void
    ProofTreeAdapter.proofClosed(ProofTreeEvent e)
    The proof trees has been closed (the list of goals is empty).
    default void

    The proof trees has been closed (the list of goals is empty).
    void
    ProofTreeAdapter.proofExpanded(ProofTreeEvent e)
    The node mentioned in the ProofTreeEvent has changed, and/or there are new descendants of that node.
    default void
    ProofTreeListener.proofExpanded(ProofTreeEvent e)
    The node mentioned in the ProofTreeEvent has changed, and/or there are new descendants of that node.
    void
    ProofTreeAdapter.proofGoalRemoved(ProofTreeEvent e)
    The goal mentioned in the ProofTreeEvent has been removed from the list of goals.
    default void
    ProofTreeListener.proofGoalRemoved(ProofTreeEvent e)
    The goal mentioned in the ProofEvent has been removed from the list of goals.
    void
    ProofTreeAdapter.proofGoalsAdded(ProofTreeEvent e)
    The goals mentiones in the list of added goals in the proof event have been added to the proof
    default void
    ProofTreeListener.proofGoalsAdded(ProofTreeEvent e)
    The goals mentiones in the list of added goals in the proof event have been added to the proof
    void

    The goals mentiones in the list of added goals in the proof event have been added to the proof
    default void

    The goals mentiones in the list of added goals in the proof event have been added to the proof
    void
    ProofTreeAdapter.proofIsBeingPruned(ProofTreeEvent e)
    The proof tree under the node mentioned in the ProofTreeEvent is in pruning phase.
    default void
    ProofTreeListener.proofIsBeingPruned(ProofTreeEvent e)
    The proof tree under the node mentioned in the ProofTreeEvent is in pruning phase.
    void

    The proof tree has been pruned under the node mentioned in the ProofTreeEvent.
    default void
    ProofTreeListener.proofPruned(ProofTreeEvent e)
    The proof tree has been pruned under the node mentioned in the ProofTreeEvent.
    void

    The structure of the proof has changed radically.
    default void
    ProofTreeListener.proofStructureChanged(ProofTreeEvent e)
